/usr/bin/c++ -fPIC    -std=c++20 -fPIC -O3 -shared -Wl,-soname,libFESpace.so -o ../../lib/libFESpace.so CMakeFiles/FESpace.dir/QuadratureFormular.cpp.o CMakeFiles/FESpace.dir/P0.cpp.o CMakeFiles/FESpace.dir/P1.cpp.o CMakeFiles/FESpace.dir/P1dc.cpp.o CMakeFiles/FESpace.dir/P2.cpp.o CMakeFiles/FESpace.dir/P2dc.cpp.o CMakeFiles/FESpace.dir/P3dc.cpp.o CMakeFiles/FESpace.dir/P3.cpp.o CMakeFiles/FESpace.dir/P4.cpp.o CMakeFiles/FESpace.dir/RT0.cpp.o CMakeFiles/FESpace.dir/RT2.cpp.o CMakeFiles/FESpace.dir/BDM1.cpp.o CMakeFiles/FESpace.dir/BDM2.cpp.o CMakeFiles/FESpace.dir/Ned0.cpp.o CMakeFiles/FESpace.dir/P2BR.cpp.o CMakeFiles/FESpace.dir/transformation.cpp.o CMakeFiles/FESpace.dir/finiteElement.cpp.o CMakeFiles/FESpace.dir/GTypeOfFE.cpp.o CMakeFiles/FESpace.dir/FESpace.cpp.o CMakeFiles/FESpace.dir/expression.cpp.o CMakeFiles/FESpace.dir/macroElement.cpp.o CMakeFiles/FESpace.dir/paraview.cpp.o  -Wl,-rpath,/home/darth/Documents/KTH/Projects/cutfem_2023+/build/lib ../../lib/libcommon.so
